channel.title: GitHub Scala Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of Scala in GitHub

item.title: apache/spark
item.description: Apache Spark - A unified analytics engine for large-scale data processing

item.title: ucb-bar/chipyard
item.description: An Agile RISC-V SoC Design Framework with in-order cores, out-of-order cores, accelerators, and more

item.title: delta-io/delta
item.description: An open-source storage framework that enables building a Lakehouse architecture with compute engines including Spark, PrestoDB, Flink, Trino, and Hive and APIs

item.title: zio/zio
item.description: ZIO — A type-safe, composable library for async and concurrent programming in Scala

item.title: ucb-bar/chiseltest
item.description: The batteries-included testing and formal verification library for Chisel-based RTL designs.

item.title: apache/kyuubi
item.description: Apache Kyuubi is a distributed and multi-tenant gateway to provide serverless SQL on data warehouses and lakehouses.

item.title: chipsalliance/chisel-template
item.description: A template project for beginning new Chisel work

item.title: joernio/joern
item.description: Open-source code analysis platform for C/C++/Java/Binary/Javascript/Python/Kotlin based on code property graphs. Discord https://discord.gg/vv4MH284Hc

item.title: com-lihaoyi/mill
item.description: Mill is a fast JVM build tool that supports Java, Scala and Kotlin. 2-4x faster than Gradle and 4-10x faster than Maven for common workflows, Mill aims to make your project’s build process performant, maintainable, and flexible

item.title: rtyley/bfg-repo-cleaner
item.description: Removes large or troublesome blobs like git-filter-branch does, but faster. And written in Scala
